# How-to Guide Starter

Use this when drafting a task-focused guide.

```markdown
# How to [complete task]

## When to use this guide

[Describe the problem this solves.]

## Prerequisites

- [Requirement]
- [Requirement]

## Steps

1. [Action]
2. [Action]
3. [Verification]

## Troubleshooting

- [Common issue and fix]
```
